title: Double mails from outlook integration

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve had this bug for quite a while now and i’m getting no responses from the support and have sent multiple requests for anyone to look at this.
I’ve attached two screenshots from our Monday account.

image1113×216 20.6 KB

image1062×1286 98.8 KB

@Julia-monday.com Could you get someone to take a look at this?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AlexJ
When did you send the emails to support? It’s very strange you didn’t receive a response as you know we answer every email within 24 hours.

I will have someone from support reach out to you via your email if that’s Ok?

posts.author: AlexJ (Alexander Johdet)
posts.cookedHtml: Perfect! I’ve tried both sending via support@monday.com and via the ? Down to the left in monday. Thanks for the fast response.
